title: neomezia cubensis subsp. oligospinosa
intro: Neomezia cubensis subsp. oligospinosa, commonly known as a variety of the psilocybin-containing mushroom species Neomezia cubensis, is a species of psychedelic mushroom. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include reduced anxiety and depression in individuals with life-threatening cancer, and improved mood in individuals with treatment-resistant depression. The therapeutic actions of Neomezia cubensis subsp. oligospinosa are attributed to its ability to promote serotonin and dopamine release in the brain, leading to feelings of euphoria and increased creativity. The bioactive constituents responsible for these effects include psilocybin and psilocin, which are psychoactive tryptamines.
